sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at FROM users WHERE status = #{status} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%') AND department_id IN (#{deptIds}) ORDER BY ${sortField} LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="namePattern != null">
        AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="deptId" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{deptId}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
<if test="offset != null">
    OFFSET #{offset}
</if>
